claim_boundary: Incremental public-contract-v3 baseline: tb/e2e candidates were regenerated; dut/bugfix candidates were reused from the previous DeepSeek run and re-scored with current assets.

invalidated_attempts.reason: thu-sui Spectre license checkout was capped to 270 seconds by timeout-s=300 and produced SPECTRE-209 license failures; not counted as final judge evidence.
ran inside sandbox without SSH/control-socket permission and failed remote workdir creation; not counted as final judge evidence.

fixed_cases.fix: EVAS parser now rejects Spectre-incompatible local real/integer declarations inside analog/procedural statement blocks.
EVAS Spectre netlist parser now rejects implicit multiline PWL wave=[...] blocks unless backslash line continuation is used.

evas_compatibility_fix.runner_fix: run_case removes stale tran.csv/strobe/plot outputs before rerunning EVAS so failed parses cannot inherit old waveform files.

evas_false_positive_cases.spectre_error: Verilog-A declaration statement outside a labeled block / Spectre compile failure
evas_false_positive_cases.candidate_issue: Generated DUT declares and initializes real variables inside an event block; EVAS accepted it, Spectre rejected it.

evas_false_positive_cases.spectre_error: Unexpected end of line in Spectre netlist PWL source
evas_false_positive_cases.candidate_issue: Generated testbench uses a multiline vsource wave=[...] block that EVAS accepted but Spectre rejected.

runner_update.change: sui-direct SSH now honors VAEVAS_SUI_PROXY_JUMP and inserts ssh -J before the target host.
runner_update.motivation: Allow thu-sui to act as the jump host while running Spectre on thu-wei.

next_actions: Use the current prompt-only EVAS pass rate as 46/236 after the syntax-compatibility fix; the preserved 48-selected dual artifact is historical diagnostic evidence.
Use Spectre-confirmed pass count 46/236 for conservative final-judge model capability.
If a same-date fully regenerated baseline is required, regenerate dut/bugfix too; this artifact is intentionally incremental.
